title: dryopteris pavoniana
intro: Dryopteris pavoniana, also known as the Pavon's wood fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Dryopteris pavoniana include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, reduce swelling, and protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
